industrials.oneliner: Industrials outlook is broadly bullish — surging PMI, resilient freight, and ASX price momentum offset soft capex.

new_orders.summary: The ISM Manufacturing New Orders sub-index registered 56.8 in May 2026, up 2.7 points from April's reading of 54.1, marking its fifth consecutive month of expansion.

manufacturing_pmi.summary: The ISM Manufacturing PMI rose to 54.0 in May 2026, up from 52.7 in each of the prior two months, beating the forecast of 53.0 (source: tradingeconomics.com).

asx_industrials.summary: The ASX 200 Industrials index (XNJ) closed at 8,358.60 on 10 Jun 2026, up approximately +3.5% over the past month (vs. the 20-day MA of ~8,074), triggering a bullish rotation signal.

semiconductors.oneliner: Surging AI capex, record NVIDIA earnings, and tight HBM supply underpin a strongly bullish semiconductor sector outlook.

china_pmi.summary: China Caixin Manufacturing PMI came in at 51.8 in May 2026, beating the 51.4 consensus forecast and remaining in expansion territory above 51.

financials.oneliner: Hawkish central banks, rising delinquencies, and ASX bank weakness signal a bearish near-term outlook for Financials.
